use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-globals because Global identifiers from different JavaScript environments.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-globals as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-globals with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-globals --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
